needs.summary: Authenticate an admin with email + password and establish an admin session. The form collects email and password, shows a submitting state, needs a displayable failure message for the inline error slot, and on success navigates to the dashboard root.
needs.filters/actions: credential verification against AdminUser by email; on success issue admin-scoped session credentials, on failure return an error message renderable in the error banner; per conventions this is local credential login with distinct admin token config and no 2FA in v1

needs.summary: Read the authenticated admin's own identity (a self/me read in entity terms). The screen already renders identity-shaped fixture data: adminAccountDemoData.email as the email input placeholder and adminAccountDemoData.org in the restricted-access footer copy; the fixture also models name and role.
needs.filters/actions: self only (current authenticated admin); role is one of superadmin or support per the conventions matrix

surfaces.surface: Sign-in form: controlled email and password inputs, submit button with spinner, submit handler
surfaces.evidence: app/login/page.tsx:97-99: handleSubmit calls no API; window.setTimeout(() => router.push("/"), 900) fakes a sign-in for any non-empty credentials (local-state-only action, so mock-fixture, not wired)
app/login/page.tsx:125: placeholder={adminAccountDemoData.email} renders the fixture constant from lib/fixtures/login.ts:12 ("excel@moxnafrica.com")

app/login/page.tsx:91-93 and 139-143: purely client-side required-field validation copy set via local setError; genuine local logic meant to stay, though server auth errors will also need this slot once wired

surfaces.surface: Footer restricted-access copy interpolating the org name
surfaces.evidence: app/login/page.tsx:156-159: "Access is restricted to {adminAccountDemoData.org} staff" renders the fixture constant from lib/fixtures/login.ts:14 ("MOXN Africa")

surfaces.surface: Logo mark, "OweMe Admin" heading, and "Sign in to the operations dashboard" subtitle
surfaces.evidence: app/login/page.tsx:9-26 and 105-113: decorative SVG uses design tokens var(--brand)/var(--gold); heading and subtitle are hardcoded local branding copy
